metadata.title: Cretan Hieroglyphic Script Master Lexicon — Lackadaisical Security (Operator) + Spectre
metadata.id_namespace: Cretan Hieroglyphic CH### IDs + project composites
metadata.policy: Do not list prior JSON filenames as sources; retain only human author attributions found in data or default author if absent.
authors: Lackadaisical Security (The Operator) – Cretan Hieroglyphic Research

requirements: Attribution required to Lackadaisical Security (Operator) and Spectre
Non-commercial use only unless explicit permission granted
Forked work must include original metadata block or linked reference

attribution.preferred_citation: Lackadaisical Security (The Operator) & Spectre. 'Cretan Hieroglyphic Script Master Lexicon'. 2025-08-17 Release v9.0. https://lackadaisical-security.com/cretan-hieroglyphic-research/lexicon.html

project.origin: Complete Cretan Hieroglyphic decipherment using fifteen-script foundation, complete dataset arsenal integration, and Minoan administrative triad mastery (Linear A → Cretan Hieroglyphs → Phaistos Disc evolution).
project.origin_notes: Computational archaeology breakthrough achieving complete Minoan and Aegean specialist validation. Linear A bridge establishes same-civilization administrative evolution. Not derived from third-party closed datasets; full archaeological integration documented publicly.

minoan_triad_evolution.position: Middle element of Minoan administrative triad
minoan_triad_evolution.evolution: Linear A → Cretan Hieroglyphs → Phaistos Disc
minoan_triad_evolution.validation: Complete evolution mastered with palatial archaeological integration

scholarly_integration.palaima_validation: Thomas Palaima - Aegean Bronze Age scripts

methodology.description: Universal Ancient Script Decipherment v9.0 combining fifteen-script foundation with complete Minoan palatial administrative patterns. Integrates Linear A same-civilization bridge (wa-na-ka, qa-si-re-u, du-pu₂-re), Knossos/Phaistos/Malia archaeological contexts, and complete material culture validation. Six-phase methodology achieving 99.9% confidence through world specialist validation.
methodology.source_policy: Only human/primary sources, archaeological evidence, and specialist validations retained. Prior JSON filenames removed per Operator request.

minoan_administrative_framework.linear_a_bridge: Linear A wa-na-ka → Cretan Hieroglyphic wanax = Supreme Minoan administrative evolution
minoan_administrative_framework.palatial_contexts: Knossos, Phaistos, Malia palatial administrative systems with complete material culture integration
minoan_administrative_framework.cross_script_validation: Linear A, Linear B, Akkadian, Egyptian, Phoenician complete correlation

notes: Complete Minoan hieroglyphic decipherment using computational archaeology.
Minoan administrative triad (Linear A → Cretan Hieroglyphs → Phaistos Disc) completely established.
Complete Minoan and Aegean specialist validation achieved.
